what_it_regulates: Offences relating to bribery and connected purposes.
who_is_affected: individuals who offer or receive bribes
key_obligations: prohibition on offering, promising, or giving bribes
prohibition on requesting, agreeing to receive, or accepting bribes
prohibition on bribing foreign public officials
duty on commercial organisations to prevent bribery by associated persons

what_it_regulates: It harmonises and reforms equality law to prohibit discrimination, harassment, and victimisation related to personal characteristics, and imposes duties on public bodies and employers to promote equality and reduce socio-economic inequalities.
key_obligations: Ministers of the Crown and others must have regard to the desirability of reducing socio-economic inequalities when making strategic decisions
Certain employers may be required to publish information about pay differences between male and female employees
Prohibition of victimisation in certain circumstances
Certain functions must be exercised with regard to the need to eliminate discrimination and other prohibited conduct
Duties may be imposed in relation to the exercise of public procurement functions

act_title: Health and Safety at Work etc. Act 1974
what_it_regulates: The health, safety and welfare of persons at work, protection of others from work-related risks, control of dangerous substances, and control of certain atmospheric emissions.
who_is_affected: members of the public affected by work activities
persons keeping or using dangerous substances
key_obligations: Securing the health, safety and welfare of persons at work
Protecting persons not at work against risks to health or safety arising from work activities
Controlling the keeping and use of dangerous substances
Preventing the unlawful acquisition, possession and use of dangerous substances
Controlling certain emissions into the atmosphere

what_it_regulates: Slavery, servitude, forced or compulsory labour, and human trafficking, including protections for victims and the establishment of an Independent Anti-slavery Commissioner.
who_is_affected: victims of slavery and human trafficking
perpetrators of slavery, servitude, forced labour, and human trafficking
organisations subject to transparency in supply chains requirements
key_obligations: Provision of protections for victims of slavery and human trafficking
Establishment and operation of an Independent Anti-slavery Commissioner
